'''thawava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobbin|dobbin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobbin|dobbin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thawava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæwævæth|thæwævæth]] || [[word:thæwævæj|thæwævæj]] || [[word:thæwævæsh|thæwævæsh]] || [[word:thæwævæ|thæwævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thawawavath|thawawavath]] || [[word:thawawavaj|thawawavaj]] || [[word:thawawavash|thawawavash]] || [[word:thawawava|thawawava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawavath|thawavath]] || [[word:thawavaj|thawavaj]] || [[word:thawavash|thawavash]] || [[word:thawava|thawava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawafvafth|thawafvafth]] || [[word:thawafvafj|thawafvafj]] || [[word:thawafvafsh|thawafvafsh]] || [[word:thawafvaf|thawafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thawavatha|thawavatha]] || [[word:thawavaja|thawavaja]] || [[word:thawavasha|thawavasha]] || [[word:thawavaka|thawavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thawavath|thawavath]] || [[word:thawavaj|thawavaj]] || [[word:thawavash|thawavash]] || [[word:thawava|thawava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thawavathal|thawavathal]] || [[word:thawavajal|thawavajal]] || [[word:thawavashal|thawavashal]] || [[word:thawavakal|thawavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thawavaathatha|thawavaathatha]] || [[word:thawavaajaja|thawavaajaja]] || [[word:thawavaashasha|thawavaashasha]] || [[word:thawavaaka|thawavaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thawavathan|thawavathan]] || [[word:thawavajan|thawavajan]] || [[word:thawavashan|thawavashan]] || [[word:thawavakan|thawavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thawavathaoro|thawavathaoro]] || [[word:thawavajaoro|thawavajaoro]] || [[word:thawavashaoro|thawavashaoro]] || [[word:thawavakaoro|thawavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
